title: Helmeppo Shows His Cruelty
description: On pages 4–6, this part moves through Shells Town and the first clues about Zoro, Morgan, and Helmeppo’s abuse of power.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I saw a poster that said that Captain Morgan is at this base.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I WANT TO GO BACK THERE AGAIN!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: EVERYONE IS SO JUMPY! I'm getting a BAD FEELING ABOUT THIS!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I can understand why they get nervous when they hear RORDOA ZOLO's NAME -- he might escape at any moment!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: BUT WHY DID THEY GET NERVOUS HEARING THE CAPTAIN'S NAME?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: WHO KNOWS!? MAYBE THEY JUST GOT CARRIED AWAY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm trying to think seriously here...

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: It looks so BIG up close!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: B-BUT I HAVEN'T MENTALLY PREPARED MYSELF YET...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: AND THOSE PEOPLE SURE WERE SCARED WHEN THEY HEARD THE CAPTAIN'S NAME...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: You won't find him just by peeking over the fence.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: OH YEAH? WELL THERE'S SOMEBODY OVER THERE!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: B-BLACK BANDANNA AND A HARAWAKI SASH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I-It's REALLY HIM! THAT'S RORDONOA ZOLO!!!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
